'''鈭歴h-l-d-y''' ('''kashaldeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulverate|pulverate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-l-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulverate|pulverate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-l-d-y
|-
! Lemma
| kashaldeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishaldeyoko|thishaldeyoko]] || [[word:jishaldeyoko|jishaldeyoko]] || [[word:shishaldeyoko|shishaldeyoko]] || [[word:kishaldeyoko|kishaldeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushaldeyoko|thuthushaldeyoko]] || [[word:jujushaldeyoko|jujushaldeyoko]] || [[word:shushushaldeyoko|shushushaldeyoko]] || [[word:kukushaldeyoko|kukushaldeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
